overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter-style RPG showing a student character exploring a magical castle interior. The character moves from a blue common room through gothic corridors and spiral staircases, ending in an astronomy tower with a ghost and magical comet display.

scene_state.functional_zone: blue common room with bookshelves and study tables

agents.ego_description: walking through a cozy blue common room toward a large wooden archway exit

tall wooden shelves filled with books and magical artifacts
gold-framed artwork hanging on the walls
ornate wooden doorway with gold trim leading to the next room

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a quiet, blue-walled common room filled with bookshelves and study furniture. The space is warmly lit and empty of other people as the character heads toward a large wooden archway.

events.description: character exits the blue common room into a large hall with blue tapestries

agents.ego_description: walking through the great hall following another student toward the staircase

massive stone pillars supporting the high ceiling
tall arched windows letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall adorned with blue astronomical tapestries and stone columns. Natural light streams through high windows as the character follows another student across the wooden floor toward a spiral staircase.

events.description: character begins descending a spiral staircase with stained glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow spiral staircase illuminated by stained glass windows. The stone walls and wooden railings curve downward as the character follows the student ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit stone corridor with wall sconces and a decorative suit of armor. The space is empty of other people as the character moves through the gothic hallway.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an elegantly decorated corridor with gothic arches, oil paintings, and antique furniture. The character passes another student walking in the opposite direction near a blue porcelain vase.

scene_state.functional_zone: astronomy tower with magical starry sky display

events.description: enters a dark astronomy tower with a magical starry sky ceiling
a transparent ghostly figure appears near the balcony railing

agents.ego_description: observing a ghost and a fiery comet in the astronomy tower, then descending the stairs

notable_agents.action: transparent ghostly figure standing on the balcony observing the comet
student ascending the spiral staircase at the end of the segment

entered.detail: circular balcony with stone railing overlooking a magical sky
dark ceiling displaying stars and constellations

ornate stone balustrade along the balcony edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark astronomy tower revealing a magical starry sky with a fiery comet. A ghostly figure stands on the balcony observing the celestial display. The character walks around the tower, passes a student sitting on the floor, then begins descending a spiral staircase, meeting another student coming up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cozy intimacy of a student common room into the vast, celestial openness of an astronomy tower. It begins within a quiet, blue-walled study area filled with bookshelves, moving through a wooden archway into a grand hall where natural light streams across astronomical tapestries and stone columns. As the camera follows another student, the scene shifts from the brightness of the hall down a narrow spiral staircase illuminated by stained glass, before transitioning into a series of dimly lit gothic corridors adorned with suits of armor and oil paintings. The path then opens into a dark astronomy tower, where the interior stone gives way to a magical starry sky featuring a fiery comet and a ghostly figure on the balcony. Finally, the camera circles the tower's edge, passing a seated student before beginning a descent down another spiral staircase.
